heading: General jurisdiction
label: 13531 General jurisdiction
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 10561 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 10561 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)

children.text: a place in a State and a place in another State, even if part of the transportation is outside the United States;
a place in a State and another place in the same State through a place outside the State; or
a place in the United States and a place outside the United States.

children.heading: .—Exemption of Certain Air Carrier Service
children.label: b .—Exemption of Certain Air Carrier Service
children.text: Neither the Secretary nor the Board has jurisdiction under subsection (a) of this section over service undertaken by a freight forwarder using transportation of an air carrier subject to part A of subtitle VII of this title.
